I wanted to write this because so many moms tell me they feel like they're failing because they don't have it all at once and it really breaks my heart. The last twelve years of my life went into building my business and building myself into the leader I am. I'm proud of that. I don't expect myself to put in the same effort over the next ten. candidates.text: Bloomberg gaming journalist Jason Scheirer and other gaming analysts don't think Sony is going to continue with physical games, despite fan outrage. Jason lists all of his reasons in a new video while some gaming analysts say even if 500K cancel their PSN subs, Sony still has around 50 million subs. That's less than less than 1% of the business. They are counting on people just accepting the all digital future because of their brand name and size.

candidates.text: Video games are in a weird place culturally because almost everyone plays them. But if you play any game outside of Roblox, Fortnite, or GTA, you're a weird nerd. I think this is a big source of the industry's current woes.
